bullets: Mentored 500+ students in full-stack web development — JavaScript, React, Node.js, SQL, and Python.
Conducted code reviews and guided debugging, architecture, and technical interview preparation.
Led workshops and lectures bridging curriculum concepts with real-world engineering practices.
Supported capstone teams through project planning, development, and deployment.
Delivered highly scalable frontend features for R&D team's insurance application used by 13,000 agents.
Developed pixel-perfect, responsive, cross-platform UIs with an Agile/Scrum workflow.
Worked closely with product managers, business analysts, and QA engineers to define and ship new features.
Delivered an API for state-based ad targeting that improved advertiser efficiency and increased revenue.
Built privacy-preserving logic to exclude small geographic regions using Google's internal IP tools.
Designed and implemented a data pipeline that generated event records 85% faster.
Built a view-generation pipeline that reduced security runtime statistics query times by 87.5%.
Implemented a rolling bloom filter for efficiently deduplicating high-cardinality runtime metrics.

priorRoles.blurb: Shipped features and automated tests for the company intranet using Ruby on Rails, Selenium, and Jest.
